options.name: --html
options.description: Display HTML body instead of text

commands.name: move
commands.description: Move a message to a folder

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort order (relevance, date, date_asc, subject, from)

commands.name: mark-read
commands.description: Mark messages as read or unread

options.name: --unread
options.description: Mark as unread instead of read

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Purge all deliveries for a webhook

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (defaults to attachment filename)
